raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current footing","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Maria?","description":"Safe opener that lets Maria set context before any growth topic is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ritual participation","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in team rituals lately, what's behind that?","description":"Checks whether the drop in participation is about the decision, workload, or something else she wants to name.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"anchor","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision readout","name":"Did you get a concrete readout on last cycle's decision?","description":"Surfaces whether she has the specific feedback she needs to make sense of the outcome.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Want the loop","name":"Do you want to unpack that decision now?","description":"Lets her opt in to a deeper conversation about the passed-over outcome without assuming she wants it.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Principal bar","name":"What does the next-level bar for Principal look like to you?","description":"Gets her to name the concrete standard she is aiming at, not a vague aspiration.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Named outcomes","name":"What outcomes would make the next six months feel meaningfully different for you?","description":"Surfaces the outcomes she wants to own so the growth plan has a real target.","purpose":"topic","stage":"aspiration","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring role","name":"What is mentoring doing for your growth right now?","description":"Tests whether mentoring is active development work or something else she is using to spend energy.","purpose":"topic","stage":"gap","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tradeoffs ahead","name":"What would you be willing to trade off to make room for the next step?","description":"Forces a real investment conversation about what has to give for growth to happen.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What kind of support from me would actually move this forward?","description":"Makes the ask concrete so the plan turns into manager action, not just reflection.","purpose":"topic","stage":"investment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next move","name":"Given what we've covered, what is the next step you want to take before we meet again?","description":"Closes on one concrete commitment that lands the conversation in action.","purpose":"topic","stage":"commitment","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
